title: The Black Cat Textures
description: A texturepack for a Shop called "The Black Cat" on TallTalesRP. Hosts textures for Tokens & Other custom goods sold by the location.
body:
![theblackcat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa5eefe5e2db8f3fd5fff888a4544df9b0de93b9.png)
![texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f664f419885862e97d8d82b4431c96967f9c544.png)
A texturepack for a Shop called "The Black Cat" on TallTalesRP. Hosts textures for Tokens & Other custom goods sold by the location.

![variantcit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62369d121cba99fe72cd4a1b4dc9b369def32716.png)
The mod Variant CIT is needed in order to see the textures!
https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit

Apply for your enchanted flora to have a custom model & texture!
https://forms.gle/pypUn9njJNd4Tbbi7

Currently has 53 textures for:
- Chess
- Checkers
- Awards
- Tokens
- More coming soon!
